summary: Verified regex escape on /api/products & /api/search and ₹ currency change on Landing page. Backend escape works: '.*' and '(unbalanced' no longer regex-match or error. Frontend pricing (₹0, ₹2,400) and dashboard KPIs (₹48,290, ₹18,441) render correctly. One minor leftover '$' prefix in Landing stats section ('Orders processed').
passed: GET /api/products?search=.* returns [] (0 items) instead of all 6 products — regex properly escaped
GET /api/products?search=(unbalanced returns HTTP 200 with 0 items — no regex parse error
GET /api/search?q=.* returns HTTP 200 with empty results — regex properly escaped
Baseline: GET /api/products returns 6 products (confirming regex was not matching all)
Landing pricing shows ₹0 and ₹2,400 (no $0/$29 in pricing tiers)
₹ symbol count on landing = 4; no $29 anywhere

failed.issue: One leftover '$' prefix in stats array (line 232: { v: 3200000, l: 'Orders processed', prefix: '$' }). Review spec requires zero '$' on landing page except URL/tech copy.
failed.evidence: grep -n '\$' /app/frontend/src/pages/Landing.jsx → line 232 prefix: "$"; page body contains '$0' from rendered stat counter start value.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Landing.jsx line 232, change prefix: '$' to prefix: '₹' (or remove) for the 'Orders processed' stat to fully honor ₹ conversion.
